name: RAW Cashew Paste
intro: Raw cashew paste is used in curries – both authentic and BIR – to thicken the sauce and to add flavour.
method: Soak raw cashews (quantity as needed) in cold water for about 30 minutes. Drain and place the cashews in a spice grinder or blender. Add just enough fresh water to blend to a paste. That’s it. You’re done.
Transfer to a bowl and store in the fridge for up to 3 days.
